articles.title: Mounjaro (tirzepatide) prescribing information
articles.summary: Official FDA-approved label for tirzepatide injection. Covers dosing, titration, contraindications, adverse reactions, and clinical-trial data for type 2 diabetes indication.

articles.title: Zepbound (tirzepatide) prescribing information
articles.summary: Official FDA label for tirzepatide approved for chronic weight management in adults with obesity or overweight with at least one comorbid condition.

articles.title: Wegovy (semaglutide) prescribing information
articles.summary: Official FDA label for once-weekly semaglutide 2.4 mg for chronic weight management.

articles.title: Ozempic (semaglutide) prescribing information
articles.summary: Official FDA label for semaglutide for type 2 diabetes, including the cardiovascular indication.

articles.title: FDA — Medications containing semaglutide marketed for type 2 diabetes or weight loss
articles.summary: FDA's official page on semaglutide products and the risks specific to compounded versions. Updated with each new development.

articles.title: FDA — Human Drug Compounding
articles.summary: Regulatory framework for compounded preparations, what compounding pharmacies can and can't legally do, and the difference between 503A and 503B facilities.

articles.title: SURPASS-1: Tirzepatide monotherapy in type 2 diabetes
articles.summary: First Phase 3 trial of tirzepatide in adults with type 2 diabetes inadequately controlled by diet and exercise. Showed dose-dependent reductions in HbA1c and body weight.

articles.title: STEP-1: Semaglutide for weight management
articles.summary: Pivotal trial of once-weekly semaglutide 2.4 mg in adults with overweight or obesity. 68-week treatment produced ~14.9% mean weight reduction.

articles.title: SELECT trial — semaglutide and cardiovascular outcomes
articles.summary: Large outcomes trial in adults with overweight or obesity and pre-existing cardiovascular disease but without diabetes. Showed reduction in major adverse cardiovascular events.

articles.title: BPC-157: pleiotropic effects review (Sikiric et al.)
articles.summary: Comprehensive review of preclinical BPC-157 research covering tissue repair, GI protection, and tendon healing mechanisms. Authors are the original BPC research group.

articles.title: Thymosin Beta-4: wound healing and tissue repair
articles.summary: Review of thymosin beta-4's role in wound healing and tissue regeneration — basis for the TB-500 fragment commonly used in research.

articles.title: Growth hormone secretagogues — Ipamorelin pharmacology
articles.summary: Original ipamorelin characterization paper — selective GHS-R1a agonist that releases GH with minimal effects on ACTH/cortisol.

articles.title: CJC-1295 / modified GRF (1-29) pharmacokinetics
articles.summary: Pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic study of the DAC-modified GHRH analog, demonstrating extended half-life and sustained GH/IGF-1 response.

articles.title: GHK-Cu in skin regeneration
articles.summary: Review of copper tripeptide GHK-Cu in dermal repair, anti-aging, and gene expression studies. Topical applications are the most evidence-supported use.

articles.title: Epitalon (Epithalon) and telomerase activity in aging
articles.summary: Russian-group research on the pineal tetrapeptide's effect on telomerase activity in somatic cells.

articles.title: Thymosin Alpha-1: immune modulation review
articles.summary: Mechanism of action, clinical evidence, and off-label uses of Thymosin α-1, approved as Zadaxin outside the US for hepatitis B/C and as cancer adjunct.

articles.title: WADA 2025 Prohibited List
articles.summary: Official World Anti-Doping Agency prohibited substances list for 2025. Lists BPC-157, TB-500, ipamorelin, CJC-1295, frag 176-191, and other peptides as prohibited at all times.

articles.title: Vyleesi (bremelanotide) prescribing information
articles.summary: Official FDA label for bremelanotide (PT-141) for hypoactive sexual desire disorder in premenopausal women.

articles.title: Egrifta (tesamorelin) prescribing information
articles.summary: FDA-approved label for the stabilized GHRH analog used to reduce excess abdominal fat in HIV-associated lipodystrophy.

articles.title: CDC — Safe Injection Practices
articles.summary: Aseptic technique standards for any injection. Covers single-use needles, single-dose vials, hand hygiene, and skin disinfection — the basics every person self-injecting at home should follow.

articles.title: MOTS-c: mitochondrial-derived peptide and metabolic health
articles.summary: Foundational research on MOTS-c, the mitochondrial-DNA-encoded peptide that regulates metabolic homeostasis and insulin sensitivity.

articles.title: Selank: anxiolytic and cognitive effects
articles.summary: Russian-research review of the tuftsin-derived heptapeptide Selank, approved in Russia for generalized anxiety disorder.

articles.title: Semax: neuroprotection and stroke recovery
articles.summary: ACTH(4-10)-derived peptide approved in Russia for ischemic stroke. Reviews the neuroprotective and nootropic mechanisms.

articles.title: AOD-9604 obesity trial outcomes
articles.summary: Reports the Phase II clinical trial of AOD-9604 for obesity — drug failed to demonstrate weight-loss efficacy at planned endpoints.

articles.title: FDA — Compounded medications: warnings and consumer alerts
articles.summary: FDA's ongoing consumer alerts about compounded GLP-1 products, including specific risks like dosing errors with units vs. milligrams.

articles.title: STEP-2: Semaglutide for weight management in T2D
articles.summary: Trial of once-weekly semaglutide 2.4 mg in adults with type 2 diabetes and overweight/obesity. Lower weight reduction than non-diabetic cohorts but still significant.

articles.title: Tirzepatide vs semaglutide — head-to-head SURMOUNT meta-analysis
articles.summary: Meta-analysis comparing weight-loss outcomes between tirzepatide and semaglutide across the SURMOUNT and STEP trial families.

articles.title: Pharmaceutical calculations (StatPearls)
articles.summary: NIH Bookshelf reference covering dilution arithmetic, mass-volume conversion, and U-100 syringe calibration — the math underlying every reconstitution.

articles.title: DrugBank — Semaglutide
articles.summary: Comprehensive pharmacology database entry: mechanism, structure, pharmacokinetics, and interaction data.

articles.title: DrugBank — Tirzepatide
articles.summary: Comprehensive pharmacology database entry covering dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonism, half-life, and clinical data.
